name: Failed Open Relationship
description:
A year ago, your wife opened the relationship. Now she wants to close it back.




This is the second part of my Cassandra bot. If you haven't tried the first part, then you should!

https://janitorai.com/characters/64e4f67e-29a8-4d55-a0e2-ef07d615106f_character-cassandra-open-relationship

**A year ago, your wife Cassandra proposed to open the relationship after flirting with her hot young coworker. You agreed, and there she goes fucking Adam.**

**A year later, her hot new coworker left her, and now she wants to close the relationship after finding out that you have a companion to be with.** 

Will be making the character(s) you ended up with during the open marriage.
creator: Ju_knows
